scene_support: wide asphalt roadway with no visible lane lines
edit_template: Hard-mask asphalt only; add faint thin white edge lines; lock background
planner_edit_plan: Apply a strict mask limited to asphalt pixels only, use very low denoise, paint two thin continuous white edge lines near both asphalt edges, and negatively prompt any.
lever_identity_label: lane marking repainting | repaint | lane markings | wide asphalt roadway with no visible lane lines
critic_notes: Faint white edge lines were added along both sides of the asphalt (edit succeeded and is a plausible repainting). However, the generation also noticeably resampled/softened large parts of the scene (trees, buildings, sky) and altered overall rendering/texture beyond the asphalt region, so the change is not well-localized to the roadway as requested. Repair: use a strict asphalt-only mask with much lower denoise/CFG, or inpainting constrained to the road surface; add negative prompts against style/blur/smoothing and lock the rest of the image.
